channel.title: CoverClarity Florida ACA Subsidy Guides
channel.description: Florida ACA subsidy estimate guides, county hubs, MAGI explainers, CSR notes, and Marketplace verification paths.

item.title: Miami single adult ACA subsidy estimate at 100 percent FPL: what the 2026 premium gap can mean
item.description: Miami single adult ACA subsidy estimate 100 percent FPL explained with Miami Marketplace premium, Single adult health insurance subsidy, estimate limits, related guide paths, and official HealthCare.gov confirmation.

item.title: At 250 percent FPL, how a Miami single adult can read an ACA premium estimate
item.description: Miami single adult ACA subsidy estimate 250 percent FPL explained with Miami Marketplace premium, Single adult health insurance subsidy, estimate limits, related guide paths, and official HealthCare.gov confirmation.

item.title: Couple in Miami: ACA subsidy calculator notes for 150 percent FPL
item.description: Miami couple ACA subsidy estimate 150 percent FPL explained with Miami Marketplace premium, Couple health insurance subsidy, estimate limits, related guide paths, and official HealthCare.gov confirmation.

item.title: Reading the Miami Marketplace estimate for a couple near 300 percent FPL
item.description: Miami couple ACA subsidy estimate 300 percent FPL explained with Miami Marketplace premium, Couple health insurance subsidy, estimate limits, related guide paths, and official HealthCare.gov confirmation.
